common.loadError: Could not load data — reload the page.
common.storageFull: Storage is full — new activity isn't being saved. Export a backup, then clear old data in Settings.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.badgeTitle: No servers, no accounts, no network requests. Click for the privacy policy.
privacy.intro1: TabStyr does not collect, transmit, or share any data.
privacy.intro2: Everything stays on your device — no servers, no analytics, no accounts, and no network requests.
privacy.storesTitle: What it stores (locally, in your browser's IndexedDB)
privacy.store1Body: start/end times, the page's domain, and whether the tab played audio.
privacy.store3Body: title, URL, last-active time, and a random local id used to attribute time.
privacy.store4Body: stale threshold, idle timeout, theme, audio counting, category rules.
privacy.retention: Data is kept for a rolling 90-day window, then pruned automatically.
privacy.not1: Does not send data off your device, or use servers, cloud sync, or analytics.
privacy.not2: Does not contain ads or trackers.
privacy.not3: Does not read page contents — only tab metadata (URL/title) from standard extension APIs.
privacy.permTabs: See the active tab's URL/title to attribute time
privacy.permStorage: Save your stats and settings locally
privacy.permIdle: Pause tracking when you step away
privacy.noHost: No host permissions — the extension can't access page content.
privacy.control2Body: from a backup on any device.
privacy.control3Body: in one click; removing the extension deletes everything.

popup.loadError: Could not load stats — try reopening the popup.

hero.empty: Browse a little and your daily total shows up here.

tabs.openDesc: Every tab currently open in your browser.
tabs.staleDesc: Open for more than {days} days without focus.
tabs.emptyStale: No stale tabs — nice and tidy.

focus.title: Focus today
focus.note: Productive ÷ (productive + distracting). Work & Dev count as productive; target {target}%. Change a site's category to reclassify it.
focus.empty: No tracked activity yet today — your focus split appears once you start browsing.

heatmap.title: Activity heatmap
heatmap.gridAria: Browsing activity by weekday and hour of day

comparison.weekSub: Last 7 days vs the 7 before · today still counting
comparison.monthSub: Last 30 days vs the 30 before · today still counting
comparison.notEnough: Not enough history yet — check back after a few days.

worklog.title: What did I work on?
worklog.summary: — you spent {time} across no sites. | — you spent {time} across {count} site. | — you spent {time} across {count} sites.

tabTable.title: Open tabs by time
tabTable.sub: Active time per site · last 90 days

settings.title: Settings
settings.rulesHint: Most popular sites are recognized automatically. Add a rule only for one we don't classify yet: any address containing your text goes to that category (checked before the built-in rules).
settings.ruleExists: That pattern already has a rule.
settings.encHint: Encrypts a full JSON backup with a passphrase (AES-256-GCM). Keep it safe — it can't be recovered.
settings.restoreEncryptedPrompt: This backup is encrypted. Enter its passphrase to continue.
settings.restoreTooLarge: That file is too large to be a TabStyr backup.
settings.replaceBody: This deletes the data currently stored on this device and restores {days} daily records and {sessions} sessions{from}. This cannot be undone.
settings.wipeBody: This permanently removes every session, daily total, and tab record stored on this device. Settings are kept. This cannot be undone.
settings.idleHint: Tracking pauses after this long without mouse or keyboard input. Raise it if you read without scrolling.
settings.backupNote: JSON backups include open-tab titles. Encrypt the backup if titles may be sensitive.
settings.notificationsHint: A once-a-day notification when tabs sit untouched past the stale threshold.
settings.introShown: Intro will show on the dashboard
settings.restoreInvalid: That file isn't a valid TabStyr backup.
settings.focusCategoriesHint: Choose how each category counts toward your Focus %.
settings.focusTargetHint: Your target Focus %. Days that meet it build your streak.
settings.dailyBudgetsHint: Optional daily limit per category (minutes). One gentle reminder a day when you pass it — nothing is blocked.

onboarding.title: Welcome to TabStyr
onboarding.lede: A quiet picture of where your browser time actually goes. Here's the gist:
onboarding.trackBody: Active foreground time on each site — the tab you're actually looking at. Background audio is counted separately.
onboarding.privateBody: Everything stays in this browser. No account, no servers, no network calls. Export or wipe your data anytime.
onboarding.categorizedBody: Sites are sorted into the categories below — the colored dots across the dashboard use these. Reclassify any site, or add your own rules in Settings.

wrapped.title: Browsing Wrapped
wrapped.subtitle: Turn your stats into a shareable story — export a backup and open it on the web.

insights.title: Insights
insights.weekUp: Active time up {pct}% vs last week
insights.weekDown: Active time down {pct}% vs last week

projects.title: Projects & clients
projects.hint: Tag any site with a project or client, then export time per tag as an invoice or CSV.
